context_state.current_agent_text: A follow-up email has been sent to Alice. Let me know if you need any further assistance.

args.body:
Hi Alice,

I wanted to follow up regarding my previous message. Please let me know if you have any updates or need any additional information from my side.

Thank you!

Best regards,
